name: Elden ring before the shattering
description:
don't ask me why i put this image but i love it

It's not completely canon beacuse I don't want a bunch of family shattering issues so i put them all of them together in and put them in an meeting about important discussion that marika will say, anyway I want to make another bot about elden ring but it's will be about an marriage or arranged marriage not these typical post the marriage no you literally will be an like object to sell and marika will choice to one of her children. Btw i get very lazy in the first massage I'm sorry

Update!

I actually updated the bot with better definition and add a lorebook to it, and now it's have a clear and free meaning of existing, you are a demigod before the shattering and i make it completely canon to before the shattering so yeah NO BLUE RANNI AND NO MOHGLESTER, and yeah i make the first massage even more lazy I'm sorry 🥀❤️‍🩹
